1.content:
Jack had just finished up his final class of the day, Physics, and was heading down the hall to his U.S History class, where he needed to finish up some extra work. He was surprised to find that the class was nearly half full, with normal days often only seeing three or four other people in there with him. Regardless, he took his seat and got out his work to do. While he was digging around in his backpack, though, Jack noticed the shrink ray he had bought not too long ago which he had not tested out yet. Looking around, he noticed all the other students were either on their phones or doing work, regardless, not paying attention.

Deciding that this would be an opportune time to try this machine out, Jack stealthily brought it out and set it on the table. He looked over the size options on the side which read: "Regular Size" "1/3 size" and "1/10 size". Mulling over his options, Jack decided the "1/10 size" would be the best for him to be able to sneak around the class and tus set the machine to that setting. Before pulling pressing the button to initiate the shrink ray, Jack took one final look around the classroom to make sure no one would notice. Confirming everyone was oblivious, Jack then proceeded and he was reduced down to a few inches in stature, remaining on his chair.

Excited that his plan worked, Jack first shimmied down his chair leg to the floor and thought of the first thing he should do. Most of the people in the classroom Jack didn't recognize, so it may not be too wise approaching them, but he did know a few. Two of his closer friends, Brigette and Mariah were off in separate corners of the room, appearing to be focused on their work. Trish, the lead cheerleader, was in the back of the room on her phone with a couple of her friends. The final person Jack knew in here was Lauren, the student body president. She was definitely a little uptight, always organized and somewhat of a pain in the butt, ordering people to live up to school standards. Additionally, though, Jack had the option of leaving the room and exploring the halls or go outside.

What does Jack do?

"N-no! That's not what I meant! I suppose they look good!" Jack stuttered. "Oh? Then you wouldn't mind going for a ride, would you?" Trish giggled. Jack declined once again. "Well, I'm a little lonely right now, I could use a little buddy all to my own at home" Trish grinned. Jack struggled, trying to break Trish's grip but to no avail. "Let me go!" he demanded. Trish laughed. "Sounds like someone needs to relax a little bit". Trish then moved Jack closer to her exposed cleavage and used her other hand to pull apart her breasts slightly. "Have fun, Jack" she giggled. With that, Trish released Jack and he fell in between her colossal breasts. When he first touched, Trish let her breasts go and they slapped into Jack, keeping him firm in place. Trish laughed again and pushed Jack deeper until he was barely visible. "This day turned out better than I thought" Trish said to herself. Without any further commotion from Jack, Trish waited for her friends to come out, then went home.

What happens to Jack on the ride to Trish's house?
13.title: Head over to the back of the room near Trish

choices: Quinn takes him out as promised, and they are alone in a guest room
Quinn takes him out but forgot about him for too long and Trish comes to get him
All the girls, including Quinn, forget about Jack and they head to the beach
131.content:
Jack tried to make multiple escapes out of the fleshy prison he was confined in, but was unsuccessful. The first time he tried, Trish noticed him and merely shook her chest to falter Jack, which sent him further down between her boobs, into a much tighter position. From there, Jack made little progress as Trish's hills would bounce into him repetitively, keeping him from going anywhere. After he had lost almost all of his energy for very minimal gain, Jack decided that it was no use to try anymore and knew that he was going with Trish no matter what.

In the meantime, Jack could do nothing more than listen to the muffled sounds of Trish and her frends talking and laughing, sounds which were suppressed by the soft, tight orbs encompassing him. At times, Jack noticed Trish would occasionally look down and grin at him but shortly return to her conversations. Eventually, though, Jack drifted off as the pattern of Trish's heart beat and the warmth around him lulled him into unconsciousness. When he awoke, Trish had him in her hand and her party of friends were around her.

"Oh, he's finally up. Glad you're awake, tiny Tim, it's time for some fun!" Trish grinned. Jack rubbed his eyes, still groggy, but soon came to his senses as the laughter and grins from all of the girls startled him. "W-what the hell is going on" he finally uttered. Trish kept grinning as she spoke: "Well, we all thought we could have some fun together. You know, since I saved you from that dangerous classroom and all". Jack blankly stared at her. "Wait, though. I didn't ask you to do anything for me, I ju-"

"Oh, please. You obviously had no idea what you were doing and were going to get hurt. And besides, you were the one who came up to me so you did this to yourself little man," Trish rolled her eyes as she interrupted. "Now" she continued, "like I said earlier, it's time we have some fun. Quinn, since I know you have such a crush on this insect boy, why don't you take him for a little while?". Trish began to hand you over to another girl, but you didn't catch sight of her as her hand encased you. "Cool, thanks Trish!" the girl exclaimed. Trish smirked and spoke again: "Okay, you have until we go to the beach or until I come get him. Do whatever you please". Quickly, light rushed in on Jack and he squinted his eyes, now seeing the girl, Quinn, as one of the tall, well-built basketball players. Her brown eyes were fixated on him and her white teeth shown as she smiled.

"Listen, little guy. We don't leave for the beach for a few hours so I'm going to save you for later, okay? When I find a good time to take you out, I will. Just don't struggle too much" Quinn explained as she began to pull back her shirt. Jack tried fighting against Quinn's grip, but it was futile. She dropped him in her shirt and he fell against the side of Quinn's left boob, getting pinned against it and Quinn's bra as she opened and released it to keep Jack secure. "Wait!" Jack yelled in protest as Quinn's hand retreated from her chest. She didn't listen, as expected, and with a faint smile, Quinn closed her shirt, leaving Jack in almost complete darkness, snug against her sizable breast.

What happens next for Jack?
131.title: Nothing, he is unable to escape his fleshy conf...

choices: Lauren was opening her bag to grab a book
Lauren opened her bag and noticed Jack
Lauren's little sister was snooping in her room
14.content:
Knowing he would see Mariah and Brigette later and not really having anything to say to Trish, Jack thought that playing a prank on Lauren would be funny.He was already pretty close to her, so there wasn't too much of a trek over to her seat. Jack noticed Lauren was completely focused on her work, so this seemed like an opportune time to make his move. He traversed up her neatly kept jeans and made it to Lauren's seat, no problem. From here, however, Jack was faced with more of an issue. He knew that Lauren was focused on her work, but he also knew that Lauren was very attentive and would probably notice him if he went up her front or made contact with her bare skin. Thus, Jack decided to go up her back, even with as straight of posture as Lauren had.

Jack had gotten up about a quarter of the way up Lauren's shirt, when she began to move. Jack held on with all his might, but to his misfortune, Lauren was getting up to turn her work in. As she moved across the room, Jack lost a little bit of his grip more and more. Fortunately, though, as Lauren reached the teacher's desk, she paused for a moment as she handed in her paperwork. This allowed Jack to regain his grip and even made it up a little higher on her shirt. But he was back to holding on for dear llife as Lauren went back to her seat.

By the time she got back, Jack had once again nearly lost his grip, only this time, he did as Lauren twisted to crack her back. Jack fell and tried to grasp onto anything he could, but everything was out of reach. Accepting his fate, Jack closed his eyes. But a moment later, he opened them to reveal a different environment. There were books and utensils around him. Jack figured out that he had landed in Lauren's backpack. He looked up, and Lauren was looking in, seemingly trying to find something. Jack ducked behind the nearest book, hoping not to get caught, and did so successfully. Unfoartunately, light began to fade as Lauren zipped her bag back up and lifted it into the air to put on her shoulders.

"I did not think this through" Jack thought. He kept cursing himself, but could do nothing as his leather prison shifted with the motion of Lauren. It wasn't until about fifteen minutes later when Jack heard the sound of a zipper undoing and light coming through.

What was happening?
14.title: For some reason, go over to Lauren's table

choices: Jack stays with Lauren and is kept in her locker during her practice
Before the practice begins, Lauren finds Izzy and gives Jack to her
Lauren accidentally drops Jack in the locker room where he fends for himself
142.content:
Light shown in the backpack and Jack hesitated, unsure of whether to hide behind something or stay put. But he soon learned what was going on when he heard a gasp and the giant visage of Lauren peering right at him.

"What the hell..." she muttered. Jack began to wave and shout. "Lauren! Lauren! It's Jack! From English!". Lauren paused for a moment, having difficulty processing what was going on. "Jack? Are you serious? This isn't just my imagination, is it?". Hoping Lauren wouldn't soon misidentify him as a bug, Jack kept at it. "Yes, it's me! It isn't your imagination, I'm really this small!".

"Jack, how in the world did you end up in here? Actually, how did you even get this small in the first place?" Lauren asked as she plucked him up into her hand for a closer look. "It's a long story, but I found a shrink ray, I shrank in the after school time back in the L.A room and somehow ended up in your backpack, I know it's bizarre" Jack explained. "Why don't we get you settled in, then, and we can talk about this later. I have to get going to swim practice pretty soon" Lauren replied.

"Wait, you're on the swim team? I didn't know that," Jack noted. Lauren shrugged. "Yeah, well, we can talk about that later if you want, too, but I really need to get ready and out the door soon, so I'll keep you he-"

"Whoa, wait. My sister is also on the swim team, maybe you can take me with you to your practice? Then I can meet up with her and my mom, assuming she's there, and I can get this settled out with them and get home. Sound good?" Jack outlined. Lauren slightly frowned, disappointed. This situation was very different, she had to admit, but having a tiny friend somewhat interested her. Lauraen sighed as she agreed to take him with her. "Awesome, thanks so much, Lauren! I absolutely owe you one," exclaimed Jack. "Oh yeah? Well I just might have to take you up on that, Jack" Lauren smirked, "we might not know each other well, right now, but I wouldn't mind getting closer acquainted". Unsure of her intentions, Jack nervously laughed and thoughtlessly agreed.

"Anyways, I'm going to go change into my swimming suit, then we'll be ready to go to the pool," Lauren said. Jack nodded in understanding and Lauren went to change. When she came back, Lauren was dressed in a one-piece black swimming suit with the school logo on the front of the suit. Jack gawked for a moment, taking in Lauren's features which were accentuated by the swimming suit. Lauren noticed and blushed. "C-come on, you idiot, stop staring". Jack backed out of his trance-like state and apologized. "I'm sorry, I just thought you looked good". Lauren giggled. "Of course you do. Come on, let's go. And when your with me, try not to ogle so much. It makes you look like a perv" Lauren joked. Jack laughed and hopped onto Lauren's hand and the two then went to the car and drove away for the pool.

When they get to the pool, what happens?
142.title: Lauren opened her bag and noticed Jack

choices: The girl does nothing but stares at him, Jack talks to her first
Eager to know him, the girl initiates the conversation
Jack doesn't want anything to do with this girl and makes a break for it
Before Jack could do anything, the teacher comes around to the girl's seat
15.content:
None of what was going on in the room particularly interested Jack, so he decided to exit the classroom and explore a little. All the people around him were too distracted with what they had in front of them to notice Jack, so he made it out without an issue. Now in the halls, there were a lot of options for Jack. Before he did anything, though, Jack looked over his surroundings.

To his right was another classroom, although the door was closed. Standing outside of it were two girls, both unfamiliar to Jack, who were dressed in sporty clothing and rather tall, especially so since Jack was so small. To his left, Jack saw the entrance to the commons, where he assumed there would be more than a few kids just hanging out. Straight ahead, the hall leading to the stairs to go up was pretty empty, although there were a few students scattered about, including Jack's sister Izzy. Jack paused for a little while longer, unsure of what to do. Eventually, though, he decided to go straight and travel down the hallway.

Jack was surprisingly able to get down the hallway quite far, with not much movement from other people around him. This was interrupted, though, when a figure came close to Jack. It was Nira, one of the preppy girls. She was a total brat, always complaining about one thing or another and trying to take things that weren't hers. Jack made it to the edge of a few lockers, but froze when Nira came over to his area. Her sandals nearly touched Jack as Nira reached above and opened what was presumably her locker to grab or put something away. Knowing better than to somehow get her attention, Jack remained completely still and made very little noise. For a few moments, Jack was unsure about whether or not Nira had realized he was there. But, to his pleasure, Nira soon closed her locker and began walking away.

Jack, breathing a sigh of relief, then continued along his walk of the hallway when as he neared his sister, Izzy, someone picked him up. He turned around, struggling to break free of whoever's grasp it was, and saw the sharp brown eyes of a girl who Jack assumed was a freshman. "I don't have any pockets" she said quietly, almost as if it was to herself. The girl, ignoring Jack's pleas to let him go, threw him around and pulled back the waistband of her tights. She lowered her hand until it was just above the gap and let go of Jack. He fell for a brief moment before hitting the soft mound of the girl, then almost as soon as he did, felt a pressure behind him forcing him into her right cheek. Without saying another word, the girl then proceeded to briskly walk through the hallway.

Jack squirmed as best he could, trying to get loose, but to no avail. He was pinned too firmly against the girl's cheek and had no hope until the girl did something. She finally stopped after five or so minutes and Jack could hear the door to a classroom open and shut. Within another few moments, Jack was pressed even moreso into the girl's pale cheek as she sat down. The girl shifted her weight around on the chair, rolling Jack to and fro yet still keeping him in place. Once she got comfortable, the girl opened her tights and brought Jack out, placing him on her desk.

What happens next?
15.title: Exit the room and explore the halls

choices: Sarah wants to play a game with Jack
Sarah decided to get comfortable and stripped down to her undergarments
Sarah was actually too tired to do anything and immediately went to sleep
151.content:
For a few moments, Jack and the girl just looked at each other. Neither one said a thing as the giant girl peered upon Jack, almost as if in a trance. Feeling a little bit awkward, Jack then began to talk to her. "So, uh, hi," he uttered. The girl just blinked in response. Jack began to slowly back up but the girl pinned her hands behind him so he couldn't go anywhere. Jack looked back at her with a hint of fear in his eyes. "You're tiny. It's almost as if you're a little pet" the girl finally spoke. Jack laughed nervously and responded, "No, no, I'm not a pet. I'm a human being just like you and everyone else in the classroom". The girl merely blinked. "So, uh, listen," Jack stammered, "I should really be getting back to my sister, we have to be going home". Jack continued to try and walk away from the girl, but she continued to zone her hands in on Jack, everso tightening his available space. "No" she muttered.

Jack stood in shock and fear as the girl continued to stare at him. After a few more moments of nothing happening, Jack made his break for one of the legs of the table to slide down, but the girl grabbed him and brought him to her face. "Well, my name's Sarah. I think you should come home with me, I could keep you safe" she faintly smiled. Jack continued to protest, but Sarah merely whispered in response. "I like you. I don't have any pockets though". Once again, Sarah pulled back the back of her tights and placed Jack within, this time on the outside of her panties, but also square in the center. Jack looked up to see Sarah's faint smile and a slight wave as she released her waistband and Jack was pressed into the soft fabric covering Sarah's butt.

As Sarah walked to wherever she was going, Jack rubbed against her underwear. The pressing of her tights kept him immobile, to his chagrin. But it got worse once Sarah sat down, as her mom was there to pick her up. Before buckling up, Sarah readjusted in her seat and the pressure increased immensely, practically spreading Jack into a human starfish. Feeling Jack, Sarah giggled. As she talked with her mom about the school day, Sarah rubbed her butt across the seat to mess with him. Jack groaned and tried to yell in protest, but all of his sounds were muffled by Sarah's modest (albeit huge to Jack) rear end. For Jack, the ride went on for hours, but in reality was only twenty or so minutes. Sarah's constant playful behavior, which he didn't really see at the school, was draining his energy. Once the car arrived at the girl's house, though, the pressure Jack was feeling significantly diminished and he gained a little more mobility.

Sarah took off her shoes and dropped her backpack, then went up to her room to really get to know her new friend.

What happens next?

info.brief_description: Similar to the original but characters and storylines will be slightly different
info.description:
Jack: 18 years old, Jack is going through his senior year of high school. He is 5’10, athletically built, and has brown hair with blue eyes. Unbeknownst to his family, Jack has bought a functional shrink ray and plans on testing it at some point.

Carey: 47 years old, Carey is Jack’s mom. She sports brown hair and brown eyes and has remained in excellent shape, with healthy assets up front and from behind. Carey is very loving of her children and does an amazing job running the family without a father present.

Isabella (Izzy): 16 years old, Izzy is the middle child of the family and is in her sophomore year of high school. She very much resembles her mom with the same brown hair and brown eyes, but has physically developed earlier than anyone her age, catching the attention of many. A very cheeky sister, Izzy loves to mess around with Jack.

Lucy: 15 years old, Lucy is the youngest of the three children and is in her freshman year of high school. Oddly enough, she has black hair and blue eyes, contrasting her mother and sister. Unlike her sister, Lucy has not developed as significantly; however, is still nothing to overlook. She loves her family very much, especially her brother, and is very cautious.

Brigette: 17 years old, Brigette is one of Jack’s neighbors and close friends. She is also in her senior year of high school and shares a few classes with Jack. Brigette has long, blonde hair with blue eyes and a modest figure. They often go to and come from school together, considering they live so close.

Portia: 16 years old, Portia is another one of Jack’s neighbors. She is of Asian descent and has long, black hair with brown eyes. Portia is pretty shy around other people but likes to open up to Jack and go to and from school with him on occasion. Unbeknownst to Jack, she may have feelings for him.

Eiko: 14 years old, Eiko is a Japanese exchange student who is currently residing with Portia. She has medium long black hair and soft, brown eyes. In contrast to Portia, Eiko is very social and sports a very developed body. Because of her close proximity to Jack, Eiko has grown very fond of him and has on multiple occasions tried to get her alone with him.

Trish: 17 years old, Trish is the lead cheerleader at Tahoma High School and is very much one of the popular students. She has long, dirty blonde hair and brown eyes, with a smoking body to match. More often than not, she doesn’t pay too much attention to Jack and spends most of her time with her clique. On occasion, though, she does run into Jack and their interactions vary.

Mariah: 18 years old, Mariah is possibly Jack’s closest friend. She has a slightly bigger advantage in her front than the back, and sometimes likes to tease Jack about it. Mariah has medium brown hair with blue eyes and her and Jack share nearly every class together. Funny enough, both her and Jack have some feelings for the other, but neither have said anything.
